infopar2: Back end is written in Java programming language and is implemented with Spring framework using Spring Boot. Runs on embedded Tomcat application server. System uses PostegreSQL database and interacts with it using Spring Data, JPA and Hibernate. System also has a Telegram bot, written in Kotlin and it interacts with main application via RabbitMQ and JMS.
infopar3: Front end is written in html, less and typescript programming languages and is implemented with Angular (7) application platform. PrimeNG components are heavily used.
infopar4: Communication between front and back ends is based on REST API, uses http requests/responses and websockets to send data from server without request.
fat: The animals of this race have lots of health, but their attacks are weaker in comparison to others. On level one, you'll be able to summon Vertet - a creature with 10 damage and 200 hp. It's no nuker, but is more likely to survive through the whole battle. On level 10 and higher you'll be able to summon Ubele - a true tank with 500 hp and 35 damage. Would you like to join Veseliba's?
dmg: The animals of this race are true killers: they will tear your enemies apart with their attacks, but their health points are much weaker than those of other races. On level 1 you can summon Lauva - a beast with 30 damage and 50 hp. On level 10 and higher Lusis will take your side in fights. It's an ultimate killing machine with 120 damage and 150 health. Do you want to see your enemies' blood?
blc: These animals are balanced with their hp and damage. On level 1 you'll be able to summon Erglis - an animal with 20 damage and 100 hp. On level 10 and higher, Lapsa will become your Johny on the spot. She has 70 damage and 250 health points. Do you need a calm, stable partner?
rel: These animals are always glad to visit your parents. And you have to bear with them and go into great lengths about your future plans (which don't exist, obviously, since you're playing ANF). Do you want this nightmare to happen? No? Send them to the battlefield instead of your home then. On level 1 you'll summon Aunt Ass and she'll drive your enemies nuts. Who is she? Well... she is a badly-educated woman in her late fifties who strongly believes in strong government and its ability to solve all the problems since 'they can see better from their positions'. Hence she votes for Putin and hates democracy. Aunt Ass approves locking someone up for innocent online activity and adores restrictive rules and laws in general. She deems domestic violence an integral part of family values; lives by 'if he beats you - he loves you'. Aunt Ass is highly superstitious, hates USA, Europe and Ukraine with passion, enjoys drinking alcohol and watching Russian state TV channels. On level 10 you'll summon Uncle Devil, the loving husband of Aunt Ass. He loves giving you lectures and explaining why the way you live is totally wrong. Loves alcohol, beating Aunt Ass up and watching TV.
earth: The Earth Strike is a basic spell - classic nuke with low chakra consumption and low-tier damage. Has no effects or special abilities. Base damage is 25 and it increments by 7 for each level of the spell. Base chakra consumption is 12 and it increments by 3 on each level. Required character level to use this spell is 1.
water: The Water Strike is the second spell you can learn - its damage is higher then earth's one. The base damage is 40 and it increases by 10 per each spell level. Chakra consumption is 20 plus 4*spellLevel. Becomes available on the fifth character level.
fire: The first spell with special effect: its damage doubles if target's resistance is lower than 0.8. Base damage is 90 and it increases by 15 each level. Chakra consumption is 40 plus 5*spellLevel. Becomes available on the 12th character level.
air: The strongest spell in the game. It deals pure damage, i.e. it ignores target's resistance. Base damage is 150 and it increases by 20 each level. Chakra consumption is 70 plus 10*spellLevel. Becomes available on 25th character level.
